# research-scan-2026-04-05

This April 2026 research scan identifies five key convergences: memory decay/forgetting is more valuable than accumulation (industry consensus), context compression is the competitive moat (56.9% retention with 58.4% less context), and hybrid LLM + classical-algorithm systems outperform pure approaches (36,000x speed advantage). For mini-agent specifically, priorities are implementing learned forgetting (P1), pressure-aware context assembly replacing current single-layer buildContext (P2), and intentional stigmergy design leveraging existing filesystem coordination (P3).
